title: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Overview

detail.title: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026: Get latest updates on notification, exam date, eligibility, application process, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, result and counselling for admission to B.Ed colleges in Jharkhand.

content.text: The Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 is a state-level entrance test conducted by the Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (JCECEB) for admission to the two-year Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) programme in various government, government-aided, self-financed, and private B.Ed colleges across Jharkhand.
This exam serves as the gateway for aspiring school teachers in the state, ensuring candidates possess the necessary aptitude and knowledge for the teaching profession.

Graduates or postgraduates aiming to pursue a career in teaching should apply once the official notification is released on the JCECEB website. The exam is held annually as a common entrance test, with admissions based on merit in the entrance exam followed by counselling.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Overview

rows: Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (JCECEB)
State-level entrance exam for Jharkhand B.Ed colleges

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Important Dates

rows: A few weeks after exam, as per JCECEB schedule

content.text: *Note: Exact dates for Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 will be confirmed after the official notification by JCECEB. Check the website regularly for updates.

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026

content.text: Candidates wondering “Who is eligible for Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026?” must meet these requirements:

items: Educational Qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Science, Social Science, Humanities, or Commerce with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/OBC/EWS and other reserved categories). Or a Bachelor’s in Engineering/Technology with specialisation in Science/Mathematics with 55% marks (50% for reserved categories).
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Science, Social Science, Humanities, or Commerce with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/OBC/EWS and other reserved categories).
Or a Bachelor’s in Engineering/Technology with specialisation in Science/Mathematics with 55% marks (50% for reserved categories).
Minimum marks relaxation applies as per the latest prospectus for reserved categories (SC, ST, OBC, EWS, etc.).
Final year students of Bachelor’s/Master’s are eligible provisionally, provided they pass before admission.
Age Limit: No specific upper age limit is typically prescribed in recent notifications; confirm in the 2026 brochure.
Domicile Conditions: Seats may have reservations for Jharkhand residents as per official rules; check the brochure for domicile requirements.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Application Process – How to Apply Online?

content.text: Follow these steps:

items: Visit the official JCECEB portal (jceceb.jharkhand.gov.in or the dedicated B.Ed link in the notification).
Click on “Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Examination 2026 – Apply Online”.
Register by providing name, mobile number, email ID, and create a password.
Log in with credentials and fill personal details, address, category, academic qualifications.
Upload scanned photograph, signature, and documents in specified format/size.
Select exam centre preferences (if applicable) and verify details.
Pay the fee online via debit/credit card, net banking, or UPI.
Submit and download/print the confirmation page and receipt.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Application Fee

rows: SC / ST and Female candidates of Jharkhand

content.text: Payment is online only and non-refundable. Fees for 2026 will be finalized in the official notification.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 – Required Documents for Admission

content.text: Candidates who qualify for the Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 must carry and submit specific documents during the counselling and admission process. These documents are required for identity verification, eligibility confirmation, and seat allotment.

sections.heading: List of Required Documents

content.text: Candidates should keep both original documents and multiple photocopies ready:

items: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam Admit Card 2026 Required for verification of exam attendance and identity.
Required for verification of exam attendance and identity.
Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam Scorecard / Result Used to verify rank and eligibility for counselling and seat allotment.
Used to verify rank and eligibility for counselling and seat allotment.
Class 10th Marksheet and Certificate Serves as proof of date of birth.
Serves as proof of date of birth.
Class 12th Marksheet and Certificate
Graduation Marksheet and Degree Certificate Required to verify eligibility criteria (minimum marks requirement).
Required to verify eligibility criteria (minimum marks requirement).
Postgraduate Certificate (if applicable) Needed for candidates applying based on postgraduate qualifications.
Needed for candidates applying based on postgraduate qualifications.
Caste Certificate (if applicable) For SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates, issued by a competent authority.
For SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates, issued by a competent authority.
Domicile Certificate (if applicable) Required for candidates claiming reservation under Jharkhand state quota.
Required for candidates claiming reservation under Jharkhand state quota.
Income Certificate (if applicable) Needed for EWS or fee concession categories.
Needed for EWS or fee concession categories.
Transfer Certificate (TC) or Migration Certificate Required by many institutes at the time of admission.
Required by many institutes at the time of admission.
Character Certificate Issued by the last attended institution.
Issued by the last attended institution.
Recent Passport-size Photographs Usually 4–6 copies as specified in counselling instructions.
Usually 4–6 copies as specified in counselling instructions.
Valid Photo ID Proof Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, or Driving License.
Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, or Driving License.
Counselling Registration Slip and Fee Payment Receipt Required to confirm participation in counselling.
Required to confirm participation in counselling.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam Pattern 2026

items: Mode: Offline, OMR-based pen-and-paper.
Questions: Objective multiple-choice.
Total: 100 questions for 100 marks.
Duration: 2 hours.
Negative Marking: 0.25 marks deducted per wrong answer.

content.text: Sample section-wise breakup (based on recent patterns; confirm in 2026 brochure):

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Syllabus 2026 (Subject-wise Overview)

items: Teaching Aptitude: Teaching profession, learner characteristics, teaching-learning process, classroom management, communication skills, educational psychology basics, evaluation/assessment.
General Awareness: Current affairs (national/international), Indian polity/constitution, history, geography, economy, science & technology, education system, social issues.
Subject Knowledge / Reasoning / Language: Basic reasoning (analogy, series, coding-decoding, classification), language comprehension/grammar, or graduation-level subject content (as per pattern).

content.text: For the detailed syllabus PDF of the Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026, refer to the official JCECEB brochure once released.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Admit Card

content.text: Download steps:

items: Visit jceceb.jharkhand.gov.in.
Click the B.Ed admit card link.
Log in with registration number and password/DOB.
Download PDF.

content.text: It includes name, roll number, exam date/time/centre, and instructions. Carry printout + original photo ID on exam day; no gadgets/notes allowed.

sections.heading: Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026 Result and Counselling

items: Check result: Visit the official site, enter roll number/login, and download the scorecard/merit status.
Merit list: Prepared based on exam marks; admission per merit/reservation.
Counselling: Online/offline registration, choice filling for colleges, seat allotment, and document verification at the allotted institute.

sections.heading: Preparation Tips for Jharkhand B.Ed Entrance Exam 2026

items: Build conceptual clarity in Teaching Aptitude and General Awareness.
Follow a 2–3 month plan with daily theory, MCQ practice, and revision.
Use standard B.Ed entrance books, previous year papers, and Jharkhand-specific practice sets.
Take timed OMR mocks; attempt easy questions first to avoid negative marking.
